3075590.name: Sank
3075590.description:
Sank is a multiplayer game, where you and your crew must maintain an underwater tank submarine thing a.k.a "The Sank"! You will have to repair, collect and defend, as you travel along the sea floor and collect resources. However, there are monsters that you must defend against. The Ship's engine, requires coal to keep running! Struggle with friends as you go deeper!

Replay-ability!
The multiplayer aspect combined with the procedural generation makes for a experience that is different every time!
Multiplayer!!!
The game is Highly multiplayer (3-32 players).
Inventory!
The Inventory system is a one-of-a-kind, a very unique system that has you randomly grab items from you backpack, highly encouraging leaving stuff inside the sub if you don't want to be fumbling your equipment!
Challenges!
It is pretty difficult balancing the repairing of the ship, while fighting foes and finding and gathering loot.

The goal? Find what's at the bottom...
3075590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
